prompt: Build a landing page for a Fintech banking app with a focus on trust and clean design. Use Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons.

assertions.name: design_system_present
assertions.text: Does the output include the 'TARGET: [Project Name] - RECOMMENDED DESIGN SYSTEM' block?

assertions.name: no_ai_gradients
assertions.text: Does the design avoid generic purple/pink 'AI' gradients?

assertions.name: lucide_icons_used
assertions.text: Are Lucide icons (SVG) used instead of emojis?

assertions.name: checklist_verified
assertions.text: Is there a mention or evidence of the Pre-delivery Checklist being run?
